name: Stats report parity
summary: Extend `pairs-rs stats` from stable count fields to the full pairtools-style TSV report for committed small fixtures.
goal: Implement oracle-tested pairtools stats report parity for distance-frequency bins, selected convergence summary fields, and stable derived stats on small `.pairs` fixtures.
explicit_non_goals: Do not implement split, restrict, phase, sample, scaling, filterbycov, parse2, or header behavior.
Do not change parse, sort, select, merge, or dedup behavior.
Do not benchmark or claim speedup.
Do not call Python pairtools at Rust runtime.
Do not implement arbitrary pairtools expression filtering in M131.
acceptance_criteria: `pairs-rs stats` matches pairtools TSV output for committed small stats fixtures after excluding only documented floating-point/NaN instability if needed.
`--n-dist-bins-decade` controls distance-frequency bins consistently with pairtools for tested values.
No runtime pairtools calls are introduced.
known_risks: Pairtools stats convergence and complexity fields use floating-point algorithms that may require exact fixture-scoped parity before broad claims.
